test_cases.name: resume_screening
test_cases.text: I'm an in-house recruiter at a tech firm. We get 500+ applicants for every junior dev role. 90% are completely irrelevant. I spend my entire Sunday manually clicking through PDFs just to find 5 people worth calling. I wish I could just automate the first filter.
test_cases.expected_problem: manually screening large volumes of irrelevant resumes

test_cases.name: scheduling_nightmare
test_cases.text: The worst part of being a recruiting coordinator is the calendar dance. Coordinating 4 interviewers with one candidate across 3 timezones takes me 45 minutes per candidate. It's the most mind-numbing part of my job.
